nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Makira owl
nodes.summary: Makira owl（Makira owl，学名 Athene roseoaxillaris），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括热带雨林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It lives in thick tropical rainforests, preferably in places where there is a lot of canopy cover

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The international union for Conservation of Nature has classed the Makira owl as near threatened mostly because of habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Species is seriously threatened by Makira Island deforestation for agricultural growth and timber extraction
